events.title: Story Time Under the Stars
events.description: Our youngest visitors can bring their imaginations as an SCI Programs Team member reads under the starry skies.

events.title: Making Waves
events.description: Discover how waves govern everything from the tiniest particles to the fabric of spacetime itself! This interactive program brings science to life with dancing flames, levitating superconductors, and a symphony of electricity.

events.title: Solar Odyssey: Journey Through Our Cosmic Neighborhood
events.description: Help guide a breathtaking journey through our solar system, exploring the unique features, mysteries, and wonders of its most important celestial bodies.

events.title: Snapping Turtle Feeding
events.description: Have you ever wondered what Snippy the Snapping Turtle eats? Come check out a feeding demonstration of one of SCI’s most ravenous reptiles! The snapping turtle feeding may be too intense for some visitors.

events.title: Iowa Skies Tonight
events.description: Locate constellations and planets, and hear myths of the night sky in this live planetarium program. Program and location subject to change.

events.title: Cold Blooded Critters
events.description: Meet and get the chance to touch some of SCI’s resident reptiles and amphibians.

events.title: Fire Works
events.description: From things that glow to things that explode, this program is a real blast!

events.title: Phantom of the Universe: The Hunt for Dark Matter
events.description: This show reveals dark matter's earliest clues, covering the astral choreography of galactic orbits and sensitive detectors hidden deep underground. Program and location subject to change.

events.title: 5:00 p.m. - Pink Floyd: Dark Side of the Moon Dome Show
6:15 p.m. - Pink Floyd: Dark Side of the Moon Dome Show
7:30 p.m. - Pink Floyd: Dark Side of the Moon Dome Show
